text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reconfirming race information—1,800 meters on
turf, 310-meter-long straight with a steep incline
of 2.2 meters before the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I acknowledge that these conditions would have
provided a stiff challenge for me in my pre-debut
state, but now...
choice_data_list: Now you can handle it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, the probability of a winning outcome
continues to rise.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will do my best to get through today's
1,800-meter race as preparation for the Satsuki
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Should I fail to do that... then perhaps it would be
wiser to change the direction of our future plans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the resolve in Mihono Bourbon's quiet
ultimatum.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Spring Stakes, which serves as a stepping
stone for the Satsuki Sho, is about to begin!
